concerns.text: Task T031 mandates '100 bootstrap samples' for Stability Selection, directly contradicting Spec SC-004 which requires '10 bootstrap samples'. This is a semantic weakening of the success criterion's verification metric, creating a non-compliant deliverable.

Tasks T013-T015 mandate immediate implementation of specific '80/10/10' stratified splits. Spec FR-003 explicitly marks the split ratios as '[deferred]'. Implementing fixed ratios now violates the constitutional principle of deferring empirical values in planning docs, effectively hardcoding a value the spec intentionally left open.

Task T021 applies PCA fallback for tree-based models if features > 5000. Spec FR-010 and Assumptions only mandate L1/L2 or PCA for *linear models* to address 'p >> n'. Applying PCA to tree models is an unrequested architectural change that risks altering feature importance interpretability without spec authorization, violating the constraint of strict adherence to defined methodology.
